input: Imagine a self-contained, hypothetical world with only the following conditions, and without any unmentioned factors or causal relationships: Kwox has a direct effect on swoq and kwoz. Swoq has a direct effect on kwoz. For those who are not kwox, the probability of kwoz is 36%. For those who are kwox, the probability of kwoz is 56%. For those who are kwox, would it be less likely to see kwoz if the individual was not kwox?
